name: Traditional Wall Sconce Brass (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Threshold™
description:
Add classic style while brightening your space with the Traditional Wall Sconce (Includes LED Light Bulb) from Threshold™. This wall sconce features a fixed wall-mounted design with an uncluttered metal body for a minimalist look. The white fabric shade diffuses light with a warm, cozy glow, while the one-way light setting with an on/off switch allows for easy function. Just mount it above the side table near your bed to illuminate your space while reading before drifting off to sleep.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
